issues.description: SearchDeck action missing required parameters: 'count' (should be 5), 'reveal' (should be true), 'filter' should specify {Amazon Lily} or {Kuja Pirates} types, and 'order' parameter for bottom-of-deck placement not supported in standard DSL
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and HasCardOnBoard condition is not supported by card text. This appears to be an unrelated effect that does not match the official card description
TrashFromHand should be a consequence action, not a separate top-level action. The trash step happens after deck manipulation completes

Missing sequential logic: look at 5 cards → reveal up to 1 matching type → add to hand → place rest at bottom in any order → trash 1 from hand. Current DSL does not capture the deck bottom-placement step or proper sequencing
